privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json. Task structure contains: id ('sharpen@1'), version ('1.0'), env_id ('example.gimp_env@0.1'), description, init (timeout_sec: 90, max_steps: 8, reward_type: sparse), hooks (pre_task and post_task scripts), and success (verifier specification). Verification background: Real Unsplash image sources (both URLs confirmed valid), GIMP's Unsharp Mask filter documented in official GIMP 3.0 documentation with parameters (Amount: 0.0-300.0, Radius: 0.0-1500.0, Threshold: 0.0-1.0). Verification uses two established computer vision metrics: Laplacian variance (standard for blur detection/autofocus systems) and Sobel edge detection (standard 3x3 convolution gradient operator).
